name: Know Your Customer
description: Know Your Customer provides a digital KYC/KYB onboarding platform for financial institutions and regulated organizations, automating document collection, company registry checks and ongoing due diligence.

seo.title: Know Your Customer — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Know Your Customer: Know Your Customer provides a digital KYC/KYB onboarding platform for financial institutions and regulated organizations, automating documen

when_to_use: Digital KYB onboarding with company registry verification
Beneficial ownership chain discovery for AML due diligence
Ongoing monitoring for changes in business control structure
Document collection workflow for corporate account opening
KYC automation for financial institution regulatory compliance

pros: Automates document collection and registry checks
Ongoing due diligence baked into the platform
cons: Platform-heavy, not a pure API-first vendor
Brand name itself is generic and SEO-hostile
Primarily EU and Asia coverage, less in LatAm
Onboarding cycle typical of enterprise tools
review.verdict: Solid corporate KYC/KYB platform for regulated firms that want workflow, not just raw APIs.
review.best_for: Regulated financial institutions automating corporate onboarding and ongoing due diligence
review.not_for: API-first teams wanting a developer-led KYB call without a managed workflow platform

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
